inputs.label: Weight
inputs.businessContext: Body weight in kilograms (e.g., from scale measurement).

inputs.label: Age
inputs.businessContext: Age in years (for reference only; Navy formula does not use age).

inputs.label: Gender
inputs.businessContext: 0 for female, 1 for male (required for U.S. Navy body fat formula).

inputs.label: Waist Circumference
inputs.businessContext: Waist circumference measured at the navel level (required for Navy formula).

inputs.label: Hip Circumference
inputs.businessContext: Hip circumference at the widest point (required for female Navy formula).

inputs.label: Neck Circumference
inputs.businessContext: Neck circumference measured just below the larynx (required for Navy formula).

formulas.bodyFatPercentage: ((gender === 1) ? (86.010 * Math.log(waist - neck)/Math.LN10 - 70.041 * Math.log(height)/Math.LN10 + 36.76) : (163.205 * Math.log(waist + hip - neck)/Math.LN10 - 97.684 * Math.log(height)/Math.LN10 - 78.387))
formulas.leanBodyMass: weight * (1 - (((gender === 1) ? (86.010 * Math.log(waist - neck)/Math.LN10 - 70.041 * Math.log(height)/Math.LN10 + 36.76) : (163.205 * Math.log(waist + hip - neck)/Math.LN10 - 97.684 * Math.log(height)/Math.LN10 - 78.387)) / 100))
formulas.fatMass: weight * (((gender === 1) ? (86.010 * Math.log(waist - neck)/Math.LN10 - 70.041 * Math.log(height)/Math.LN10 + 36.76) : (163.205 * Math.log(waist + hip - neck)/Math.LN10 - 97.684 * Math.log(height)/Math.LN10 - 78.387)) / 100)
